# Krishna Mahawar — Research Guide for Students

> A practical guide to starting academic research from scratch, publishing papers, and building a career through internships and fellowships.

## Author

Krishna Mahawar — B.Tech Mining Engineering, NIT Raipur. IIT Madras Summer Research Fellow. IIT BHU Research Intern. First author at ISAMET 2026 International Conference.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/): Main landing page with research guide overview, book preview, and email signup
- [Fellowships & Programs](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/fellowships): 50+ research fellowship programs with deadlines and stipends
- [Professor Database](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/professor-database): Database of professors who actively take undergraduate interns
- [Cold Email Templates](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/cold-email-templates): Proven email templates based on 130+ real outreach attempts
- [Internship Guide](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/internship-guide): Step-by-step notes on landing research internships
- [Project Ideas](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/project-ideas): Starter research project ideas across engineering disciplines
- [Career Roadmaps](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/career-roadmaps): Preparation paths for Core Engineering, Tech, and Research careers
- [Research Tools](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/research-tools-and-resources): Curated tools and resources for researchers
- [Reference Checker](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/reference-checker): Free tool to validate academic paper references
- [Beta Reader Application](https://www.krishnamahawar.in/beta-reader): Apply to be an early reader of the upcoming book

## Contact

- Email: admin@krishnamahawar.in
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/krishna-mahawar/
